name: XCel Brands, Inc.
summary: Xcel Brands, Inc. is a media and consumer products company engaged in the design, licensing, marketing, live streaming, and social commerce sales of branded apparel, footwear, accessories, fine jewelry, home goods, and other consumer products. Its brand portfolio includes Halston, Judith Ripka, C Wonder, TowerHill by Christie Brinkley, LB70 by Lloyd Boston, Longaberger, and Isaac Mizrahi. The company distributes through interactive television (QVC, HSN, JTV), e-commerce, social commerce, and traditional brick-and-mortar retail channels, generating over $5 billion in retail sales via live streaming.
